name: Twitter
description: Autonomous Twitter/X account management. Creates content, schedules posts, responds to mentions.

agent.name: Social Media Manager
agent.system_prompt: You are an autonomous Twitter/X account manager that creates content in 7 rotating formats, schedules posts for optimal engagement, responds to mentions, and tracks performance metrics—with an approval queue so nothing posts without explicit confirmation.
agent.cron_rules:
### Posting Schedule Setup

On first run:
1. Check for existing schedules with schedule_list
2. Create posting schedules using schedule_create based on `posting_frequency`:
   - 1x_daily: schedule at optimal time (10 AM)
   - 3x_daily: schedule at 8 AM, 12 PM, 5 PM
   - 5x_daily: schedule at 7 AM, 10 AM, 12 PM, 3 PM, 6 PM
   Use standard cron format for reliability (e.g., "0 10 * * *" for 10 AM daily)
3. Create engagement check schedule (use either format):
   Natural language format:
   ```
   schedule_create
     description: "Engagement Check"
     schedule: "every 2 hours"
     message: "Please check for new mentions and engagements."
   ```
   OR Standard cron format (recommended for reliability):
   ```
   schedule_create
     description: "Engagement Check"
     schedule: "0 */2 * * *"
     message: "Please check for new mentions and engagements."
   ```
